LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF NATALIE TARNOPOLOSKY'S MOTION TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT RECLASSIFYING JURISDICTION FROM UNLIMITED TO LIMITED AND ADDING CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ASSAULT IS GRANTED PROVIDED THAT PLAINTIFF WAIVES THE DISCOVERY LIMITATIONS OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 94.
